topWPAPlays.description: Coby Mayo doubles (4) on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Leody Taveras scores.
Adley Rutschman homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field. Blaze Alexander scores.
Gunnar Henderson grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Gunnar Henderson out at 1st.

Pete Alonso singles on a ground ball to right fielder Spencer Jones. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso out at 2nd on the throw, right fielder Spencer Jones to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice.
Blaze Alexander singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Max Fried. Blaze Alexander to 2nd. Blaze Alexander advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Max Fried.
Zach Neto homers (7) on a fly ball to left field. Oswald Peraza scores.
Daniel Schneemann singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Rhys Hoskins scores. Travis Bazzana to 2nd.

Mike Trout challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Mike Trout called out on strikes.

Daylen Lile homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field. CJ Abrams scores.
Tyler Stephenson hits a grand slam (3) to left center field. JJ Bleday scores. Spencer Steer scores. Nathaniel Lowe scores.

Blake Dunn grounds out, second baseman José Tena to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Matt McLain doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to left fielder James Wood.
Mickey Moniak homers (12) on a fly ball to right field. Ezequiel Tovar scores. Brett Sullivan scores.

Henry Davis reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Kyle Karros. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Nick Gonzales scores. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Henry Davis to 2nd. Interference error by pitcher Jose Quintana.
Jake McCarthy doubles (7) on a line drive to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Troy Johnston scores. Kyle Karros to 3rd.
Kyle Karros singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. TJ Rumfield scores. Troy Johnston to 3rd.

Rockies challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Rockies challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Brett Sullivan reaches on a fielder's choice out, first baseman Jared Triolo to catcher Henry Davis. Jake McCarthy out at 3rd. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.

Dillon Dingler flies out to right fielder Carson Benge.

Mike Yastrzemski doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Michael Harris II scores. Ha-Seong Kim out at home on the throw, center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong to shortstop Dansby Swanson to catcher Carson Kelly.

Mauricio Dubón grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. José Azocar out at 2nd. Mauricio Dubón out at 1st.

Jarred Kelenic doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Starling Marte. Colson Montgomery scores. Andrew Benintendi scores. Jarred Kelenic out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Starling Marte to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to catcher Elias Díaz to third baseman Maikel Garcia.
